mapper.select: select tt.topic_name from fr_special fsl left join tb_topic tt on fsl.topic_id = tt.topic_id where special_id = #{specialId}

select ti.thumb_url, ti.image_name fileName, ti.group_code, ti.wax_code, ti.animal_code, ti.sex_flag gender_flag, su.user_name createUser, fs.create_time, fs.description, fs.slide_id from fr_slide fs left join tb_image ti on fs.image_id = ti.image_id left join sys_user su on fs.create_by = su.user_id where fs.slide_id = #{slideId}

select fs.slide_id, t2.wax_code from fr_slide fs left join fr_special fsl on fs.special_id = fsl.special_id left join tb_image t2 on fs.image_id = t2.image_id where fsl.topic_id = #{topicId} and fsl.species_id = #{speciesId} and fsl.del_flag = '0'

select s.slide_id, s.special_id, s.image_id, m.status, m.group_code, m.wax_code, m.animal_code, m.sex_flag, s.description, s.del_flag, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, m.image_id, m.thumb_url, m.image_path, m.format, m.width, m.height, m.resolution_x, m.resolution_y, m.source_lens, m.image_path, m.thumb_url, m.image_name, m.topic_id, m.topic_name, s.viewers from fr_slide s left join tb_image m on m.image_id = s.image_id
s.slide_id = #{slideId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
SELECT DISTINCT b.wax_code FROM fr_slide a JOIN tb_image b ON a.image_id = b.image_id WHERE a.special_id = #{projectId} AND a.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY b.wax_code_order asc, b.wax_code asc

select ti.thumb_url, ti.image_name fileName, ti.image_path, ti.format, ti.width, ti.height, ti.resolution_x, ti.resolution_y, ti.source_lens, ti.image_id, ti.image_name, ti.group_code, ti.wax_code, ti.animal_code, ti.sex_flag, ti.topic_name, fs.create_time, fs.description, fs.slide_id, fs.viewers from fr_slide fs left join tb_image ti on fs.image_id = ti.image_id
fs.special_id = #{projectId} and fs.del_flag='0'

select t.* from (select case WHEN (select count(fss.single_id) from fr_slide fs left join fr_single_slide fss on fss.slide_id = fs.slide_id where fs.special_id = #{projectId} and fs.del_flag = '0' and fss.single_id is null) = 0 then 'false' WHEN (select count(fss.single_id) from fr_slide fs left join fr_single_slide fss on fss.slide_id = fs.slide_id where fs.special_id = #{projectId} and fs.del_flag = '0' and (fss.forecast_status in ('0', '3') or fss.ai_status_fine in (0, 3))) > 0 then 'false'
else 'true' end as aa) t

select distinct tg.organ_tag_id, tg.organ_tag_code, tg.organ_name from tb_organ_tag tg left join fr_single_slide fss on fss.category_id = tg.organ_tag_id left join fr_slide fs on fs.slide_id = fss.slide_id where fs.del_flag = '0' and fs.special_id = #{projectId} and tg.organization_id = #{organizationId}

SELECT a.slide_id AS slideId, a.image_id AS imageId, b.image_path AS imagePath, b.file_name AS fileName, d.topic_name AS topicName, e.organization_id AS organizationId, e.organization_name AS organizationName, c.species_id AS speciesId FROM fr_slide a LEFT JOIN tb_image b ON a.image_id = b.image_id LEFT JOIN fr_special c ON a.special_id = c.special_id LEFT JOIN tb_topic d ON c.topic_id = d.topic_id LEFT JOIN sys_organization e ON c.organization_id = e.organization_id WHERE a.del_flag = '0' AND a.ai_status = 0 AND a.special_id = #{projectId}

SELECT a.image_id AS imageId, b.image_path AS imagePath, a.slide_id AS slideId, f.single_id AS singleId, f.category_id AS categoryId, e.organization_id AS organizationId, e.organization_name AS organizationName, d.topic_name AS topicName, c.species_id AS speciesId FROM fr_slide a LEFT JOIN tb_image b ON a.image_id = b.image_id LEFT JOIN fr_special c ON a.special_id = c.special_id LEFT JOIN tb_topic d ON c.topic_id = d.topic_id LEFT JOIN sys_organization e ON c.organization_id = e.organization_id LEFT JOIN fr_single_slide f ON a.slide_id = f.slide_id WHERE a.slide_id = #{slideId}
